mapper.select: SELECT r.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, o.org_name, r.read_flag, r.read_time FROM sys_message_receiver r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_org so on so.user_id = u.id and so.is_main = '1' LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON so.org_id = o.id WHERE r.message_id = #{messageId}
